meaning: adj.(公司或其它组织的)各办公室间的
examples: This new fax machine will enhance interoffice communications.
It is based on the availability of channel interoffice signaling.
D To make interoffice communication easier for a company's employees.
Many who don't participate in the interoffice networking often feel left out of the group, or even suffer professionally.
The moment was signature Steve Jobs: Standing on stage at the Macworld conference in San Francisco, Apple's chief executive pulled out an interoffice envelope and opened the flap.
